_comment: Tag ruleset for release tags `v*` — bypassed by github-actions[bot] (the actor when release-please.yml runs with GITHUB_TOKEN) and the repo admin role. Imported via `gh api repos/amiwrpremium/go-derive/rulesets --method POST --input .github/rulesets/tags-v.json`.
name: release-tag-protection

bypass_actors._comment: github-actions[bot] App ID — release-please.yml runs with GITHUB_TOKEN, so its commits/tags are authored by this app. Switch to a different App ID if you install the standalone release-please GitHub App and configure the workflow to use its token instead.
Repo admin role — GitHub's built-in admin role ID is 5. Lets repo admins create/move/delete release tags directly when needed.
